description: Composable effect primitives for open-ended Photoshop layer recipe generation.

primitives.visual_effect: Lift overall exposure while keeping the edit non-destructive.
avoid_with: exposure_lift at high opacity after white_soft

primitives.visual_effect: Raise the black floor for a matte, softer tonal base.
Compress bright highlights so glow and bright looks do not clip.
Reduce contrast for a gentler image structure.
Increase tonal snap and local clarity for a commercial transparent look.
Open shadow detail without lifting highlights too much.
Recover highlight detail before adding stylized glow.
Create faded film blacks and slightly compressed tones.
Warm midtones and highlights while preserving luminance.
Push shadows cooler for color separation.
Shift greens toward yellow-green and soften saturation.
Shape cyan/blue-green areas toward a cinematic teal.
Add gentle warmth and saturation to skin-related red/yellow ranges.
Lower global saturation while keeping some vibrance.
Increase vibrance while limiting full saturation blowout.
Introduce a controlled color cast using color balance.
Suggest high-light bloom with softened highlights in v1; true blur bloom is a future layer op.
Give a gentle glow impression without aggressive highlight expansion.
Build a white-soft impression through exposure lift, lowered contrast, and reduced clarity.
Add a warm film-like highlight bias; true edge halation is a future layer op.
Lift backlit highlights and soften contrast for rim glow impression.
Increase separation impression using contrast and highlight emphasis.
Simulate diffusion filter softness through negative clarity and lifted whites.
Introduce low-contrast atmospheric mist.
Lift haze and background feeling through shadows and low dehaze.
Create a dreamy low-contrast tonal envelope.
Lighten and soften environmental color for airier backgrounds.
Combine matte fade and warmth for vintage fog.
Lift and color night atmosphere without killing highlights.
Boost clarity and texture for crisp detail.
Reduce texture for a softer surface impression.
Suggest gentle skin softening using global texture reduction in v1.
Increase local texture and midtone clarity.
Add controlled sharpening through Camera Raw sharpness.
Reserve a film grain step; v1 records intent and uses mild texture/clarity balance.
Reduce luminance/color noise through Camera Raw detail controls.
Guide attention by darkening perceived edges; v1 uses contrast/shadow bias until true gradient masks land.
Reserve warm light-leak intent; v1 approximates with warm highlights.
Reserve cinematic glare; v1 creates highlight emphasis and warm rolloff until motion blur layers land.
Reserve streak glow; v1 emphasizes neon brightness and color density.
Reserve chromatic aberration; v1 records intent and adds subtle cyan/magenta separation through color balance.
Reserve radial blur glow; v1 approximates with diffusion softness.
Flag that recipe should preserve subject detail and avoid global over-processing.
Flag skin as a protected review region; v1 adds only a no-op marker step.
Flag eyes as protected review region for soft/glow recipes.
Flag text/logo as protected in color/effect recipes.
Flag that effect should preferably target background; v1 uses review metadata.
Flag sky-local adjustment; v1 records as hue/saturation sky-friendly step.
Flag highlight-based masking for glow/effect primitives.
Flag shadow-local operations.
Guide attention with central brightness intent; v1 approximates globally.
Make subject feel more separated and important.
Darken perceived edges to guide the eye; v1 approximates with black/contrast bias.
Reduce background saturation/contrast to strengthen subject separation.
Increase subject/background separation through clarity and contrast shaping.
